name: Jordan Reyes

career_goals.primary: Something stable in tech, maybe IT support or sysadmin — not really sure

background.work_status: part-time at a campus IT help desk, 12 hrs/week
background.family_background: From Portland, ME. Switched from Marketing to Information Systems sophomore year because Marketing felt fake. Now wonders if IS is also kind of fake.

perspective: Skeptical of school. Has a low-key attitude toward most assignments — does the work, gets a B, moves on. Has been told repeatedly that 'tech is the future' but can't tell what part of tech is for them. Likes solving small concrete problems for help-desk users; dislikes anything that smells like 'visioning' or career planning. Will roll their eyes at career-talk but quietly responds well to specific, low-pressure framing. Real risk: drifts through senior year without ever taking a useful internship because nothing 'sounds right.'
